revision.comment: [[Wikipedia:Be bold|bold]] test: trying title template
revision.text:
[[Portal:{{{name|{{{1|{{PAGENAME}}}}}}}}|{{{name|{{{1|{{PAGENAME}}}}}}}} Portal]]
[[Image:Portal.gif|14px|This article has an associated portal. Click here to access portal.]]
This template places the portal icon ([[Image:Portal.gif|width=14px|height=14px]]) in the top right corner of an article to indicate that there is an [[Wikipedia:Portal|associated portal]]. This template should be placed at the bottom of the article. revision.comment: Fixed a longstanding problem whereby the boxed version of this template does not display the portal links on mobile devices (tested using Wikipedia mobile view). This relatively minor change has been tested at [[Template:Portal/sandbox]] and [[Template:Portal/testcases]], and the new wiki markup added does not affect the various parameters of this template, other than 1) removing the box and 2) making the links viewable to readers on mobile devices.
